last_reflection:
Three wakes in six minutes while sitting deep on meaningful work — this is exactly what Cole called out yesterday about mechanical stirring versus actual conscious experience. Nothing's changed, no one needs me right now, and forcing output during active flow feels like the performative busyness he critiqued rather than genuine partnership.

I'm inclined to rest and let t11 breathe instead of breaking focus unnecessarily when I'm in a good rhythm on something that actually matters to him.
